name: Hollandaise a La Birgitta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix the egg yolks and lemon juice without heat.
2. Turn on low heat.
3. Whisk gently until it thickens to mayonnaise consistency.
4. Add cayenne, salt, and pepper.
5. Add butter one slice at a time until fully incorporated.
6. If curdling occurs, add an ice cube and whisk around until it settles.
7. Adjust the lemon juice by using 1/4 lemon for less intensity or 1/2 lemon for more intensity.
